steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The passage uses a 'not only...but also' structure pairing the blank with 'illuminate.' The blank verb describes what fossil remains help scientists do with evolutionary steps — it must mean perceiving or identifying something clearly.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — ‘exploit’: “Exploit” means to use something for benefit; the passage is about identifying evolutionary steps, not exploiting them. ✗
  • Choice B — ‘prioritize’: “Prioritize” means to treat something as more important than something else; the passage does not compare the importance of evolutionary steps. ✗
  • Choice C — ‘yield’: “Yield” means to produce or provide; the fossils can yield evidence, but they do not yield the evolutionary steps themselves. ✗
  • Choice D — ‘discern’: Means to perceive or identify clearly — exactly how fossil remains help scientists recognize the evolutionary steps. ✓
That confirms D is correct.
